calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Michael Shepherd, Esq., for the Plaintiff Yelena Glezer.
Plaintiff Yelena Glezer sworn and examined. Aleksandr Zeltser sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Fabien Gestas.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited. The Agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 6900 Fulton Street, Unit #2, San Francisco, CA 94121.
Damages $8,600.00
Holdover damages $2,006.00
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $410.00
for a Total Judgment of $12,016.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Denied
